title: Wild Fighters
subTitle: Investigating the different reasons that lead animals to face tough disputes.

title: Deadliest South Africa
subTitle: Kurdt Greenwood's is on a quest is to seek out South Africa's 12 most deadly snakes and to educate and inspire people to see the value of these often misunderstood creatures.

title: Deadliest South Africa
subTitle: Kurdt Greenwood's is on a quest is to seek out South Africa's 12 most deadly snakes and to educate and inspire people to see the value of these often misunderstood creatures.

title: Tiger Legacy
subTitle: The crew looks at the various challenges mothers of different species face to survive and keep their cubs alive.

title: Italy: The Last Wilderness Year 1
subTitle: Surviving the vast mountains of Italy, the chamois are an endemic group of species that are facing a series threat of extinction.

title: Italy: The Last Wilderness Year 1
subTitle: Explore the life of a family of brown bears in a year, the special characteristics of the rutting season of Roe Deer in the Mountains of Central Italy, and the migration of salamanders in autumn.

title: Wild and Wonderful Denmark
subTitle: Getting up close and personal with Danish wildlife that live in the country's forests. The cameras film inside a fox den with a mother fox and her newborn cubs, and follow a majestic golden eagle whilst it is out hunting.

title: Gladiators
subTitle: There are clashes over precious resources when the dry season brings a band of gladiators to an African savannah watering hole. There is a lion-elephant territory brawl, an ant raid on a termite mound and a honey badger's dance with a deadly snake.

title: Epic Animal Encounters
subTitle: In the Kruger National Park in South Africa, Dianne finds a boomslang and a chameleon in a duel on the tar road. Not an environment where they would encounter each other under any normal circumstances.

title: Leopard Dynasty: The Rise of Rana
subTitle: In India's Jhalana Reserve, strength, strategy and survival collide in a wild power struggle. Ageing leopard Bahadur rules until his son, Rana, challenges his dominance. As father and son clash, alliances form, and a new chapter begins.

title: The Brown Hyena of Makgadikgadi
subTitle: The filmmaker explores the lives and survival tactics of a family of brown hyenas residing amidst the saltpans of Botswana.

title: River Monsters
subTitle: Jeremy Wade investigates a case in Nepal that sounds strangely familiar - a lone fisherman dragged off his feet and into a mountain river by the original river monster, the goonch catfish.

title: Becoming Prey
subTitle: Mawindo is the Swahili Word for prey. Life in the African Savannah is hard on herbivores but as in the case of predators, they too have their own strategies and skills to survive. However, none of them are prepared for the great hunter.

title: Brave Wilderness
subTitle: Adventurer and animal expert Coyote Peterson and his crew go on a wild world of adventure as they encounter various animals up close and learn new things about them.

title: Brave Wilderness
subTitle: Adventurer and animal expert Coyote Peterson and his crew go on a wild world of adventure as they encounter various animals up close and learn new things about them.

title: Tiger 24
subTitle: After a wild tiger kills two men in its territory, it's declared a man-eater and relocated to a zoo, causing massive social uproar.

title: Animal Arms Race
subTitle: More animal warriors compete for survival in the world's lush jungles and dense forests than anywhere else on the planet.

title: Africa's Trees of Life
subTitle: Explore the importance of the sausage tree in sub-Saharan Africa's ecosystem and the vital role it plays in providing sustenance and sanctuary for local animals.

title: Africa's Trees of Life
subTitle: Explore the importance of the camel thorn in sub-Saharan Africa's ecosystem and the vital role it plays in providing sustenance and sanctuary for local animals.

title: Africa's Trees of Life
subTitle: Explore the importance of the marula tree in sub-Saharan Africa's ecosystem and the vital role it plays in providing sustenance and sanctuary for local animals.

title: New Kids in the Wild
subTitle: Following different animals from birth as they take their first steps out into the world.

title: New Kids in the Wild
subTitle: Sea lion Lola takes her first steps into a macho battlefield on Argentina's coast, learns key vocal and swimming skills, fights to stay by mum Maria's side, and makes a lightning-fast escape from the jaws of death.

title: New Kids in the Wild
subTitle: Follows Southern muriqui Dora after she takes her first steps away from her mum, Mimi, and explores spider monkey troop dynamics and tail-hanging technique.

title: New Kids in the Wild
subTitle: An adventure with Thiago, a brave baby coati. Explores how this raccoon-like animal sharpens his sniffing and foraging skills, crosses suburban roads near his lush Brazilian forest home, and avoids inanimate and four-legged dangers.

title: Jungle Planet
subTitle: Cameras capture the beauty, diversity and richness of the world's forests and jungles.

subTitle: The filmmaker sheds light on a feline predator and her dramatic struggle for survival as she catches prey and feeds her young in the cold and unforgiving conditions.

title: The Big Dry
subTitle: The drought in the Luangwa valley strengthens due to a global El Nino event. There has been no rain since April and desperate animals are drawn to the only source of water left in the valley, the Luangwa River.

title: The Big Dry
subTitle: The rains are late and it is the most brutal time of year. Babies born into drought face starvation. When the rain arrives, it is a downpour on an enormous scale and alien creatures emerge into a different world.

title: Extreme Africa
subTitle: In north Tanzania, towering mountains line a dramatic valley. Enriched by ancient volcanoes, its slopes provide a variety of habitats for life to thrive, and its great centrepiece holds water through even the driest of times.

title: Zambia Untamed
subTitle: In the Luangwa Valley lies a grove of Ebony trees, home to a troop of baboons. But, there are dangers here as the resident leopard is powerful and agile enough to climb trees.

title: Zambia Untamed
subTitle: The plains and woodlands of the Luangwa Valley are the wildest and most merciless of all neighbourhoods where duels between predator and prey are played out both day and night. For the animals that call this home, it's a daily battle to stay alive.

title: Cave Crocs of Gabon
subTitle: Experts and cavers investigate a community of dwarf crocodiles living in a series of underground caves in the wilderness of Gabon.

title: Africa's Hunters
subTitle: Kamuti is a wise old leopard who has reigned over two square miles of prime territory in the Luangwa Valley for ten years, but now she is in trouble. At 13-years-old, Kamuti is one of the oldest leopards in the African bush, and she is not as effective a hunter as she used to be. Kamuti's problems are compounded by her neighbours, the Nsefu pride of lions, who steal her kills and attack her on sight.

title: A Wolf's Journey
subTitle: Driven out of his pack, a young wolf has to face his fate alone and try to survive in a world ruled by man.

subTitle: Going up against some of Australia's wiliest gladiators and their impressive arsenals and looking into whether these weapons, such as the kangaroo's deadly boxing moves, can help them survive the ravages of climate change.
